summaryForNext: flint-forge#7 STILL OPEN — all 3 bugs present on forge's live dirty tree; goal 1 (real forge gateway boot) stays BLOCKED/gated. Pivot to CI wiring: existing Rust CI green (frf-domain vendored, no cross-repo deps), but the REAL smoke can't run in stock CI (siblings not in-repo). Recommend stub-smoke-per-PR + opt-in nightly real smoke + a make/README target for run-real.sh --no-build. Optional stretch: realtime-receipt via a dev IdP + Keto seed. Analyze decision: the CI shape.
